comic.description: Read this passage in comic mode, switch to text anytime.

feedback.disclosure: Text and comics are AI-assisted and edited by humans.
feedback.prompt: What's the problem? (pick all that apply)

feedback.selectReason: Please select at least one issue.

futureBooks.title: What to read next?
futureBooks.description: Tell us which classic you'd love to read. We'll notify you when it's ready.
futureBooks.prompt: Which one do you want most?
futureBooks.privacy: We'll only notify you when the book is ready to read.
futureBooks.success: Got it! We'll let you know when your pick is ready.
futureBooks.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
futureBooks.submitError: Submission failed. Please try again later.
futureBooks.networkError: Network error. Please try again later.

followSubscription.title: Want the next chapter?
followSubscription.description: You've reached the end of what's live. We'll let you know when the next chapter is ready to read.
followSubscription.prompt: Leave your email and we'll notify you when the next chapter goes live.
followSubscription.privacy: We'll only email you when the next chapter of this book is ready.
followSubscription.success: You're on the list. We'll let you know when the next chapter is ready.
followSubscription.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
followSubscription.submitError: Submission failed. Please try again later.
followSubscription.networkError: Network error. Please try again later.

locale.chapterUnavailableTitle: This chapter is not in English yet.
locale.chapterUnavailable: English reading currently covers only chapters that already have approved English passages. You can read it in Chinese for now.
